name: Lemon Ice Box Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup lemon juice (about 1-2 lemons, depending on juiciness)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and sugar until pale yellow.
3. Stir in the water, lemon juice, lemon zest, and vanilla extract until combined.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie crust.
5. Cover with foil and refrigerate for at least 6 hours or overnight.
6. Before serving, remove from refrigerator and allow to come to room temperature.
7. Serve chilled.
